data.title: Solana Mobile: Partnering with chip manufacturers, plans to integrate hardware kits into over 2 billion Android phones.
data.description: Solana officially announced on the X platform that Solana Mobile is working with chip manufacturers to bring hardware integration kits to over 2 billion Android phones.

data.title: OCC Clears Circle, Ripple and Others to Launch Crypto National Banks
data.description:
The OCC has conditionally approved five crypto firms, including Circle and Ripple, to launch national trust banks.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/occ-clears-circle-ripple-and-others-to-launch-crypto-national-banks/

data.title: Tether Moves to Acquire Majority Stake in Juventus Football Club
data.description:
Tether has submitted an all-cash offer to acquire a 65. 4% stake in Juventus and plans to invest up to €1 billion in the club’s long-term development.
source: https://btcusa.com/tether-moves-to-acquire-majority-stake-in-juventus-football-club/

data.title: Ripple, Circle, BitGo Among Five Crypto Firms Granted Conditional U.S. Bank Charters
data.description:
Five major digital asset companies, including Ripple, Circle, and BitGo, have secured initial conditional approvals from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) to operate as national trust banks, marking one of the most significant steps yet toward integrating the crypto sector into the U. source: https://www.ethnews.com/ripple-circle-bitgo-among-five-crypto-firms-granted-conditional-u-s-bank-charters/

data.title: HSBC, Swift, and Ant International make tokenized deposits across borders using ISO 20022

data.title: Kalshi To Power Coinbase New Internal Prediction Platform, Insider Reveals
data.description:
According to a report from CNBC, Coinbase (COIN), the largest cryptocurrency exchange in the US, is preparing to launch its own prediction market in collaboration with Kalshi, one of the largest federally regulated financial exchanges in the country. Coinbase Teases Major Updates The anticipation surrounding the prediction market has been building for nearly a month. Recently, a screenshot of what appears to be Coinbase’s prediction markets dashboard was shared by Silicon Valley researcher Jane Manchun Wong in a post on social media site X (previously Twitter), shedding some light on the features of the forthcoming product. Related Reading: Crypto Market Dips: The Reasons Behind Bitcoin Plunge Below $90,000 Despite FOMC Optimism The Information first indicated on November 19 that Coinbase planned to introduce these prediction markets powered by Kalshi, with a formal unveiling set for the “Coinbase System Update” event scheduled for December 17
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/coinbase/kalshi-to-power-coinbase-new-internal-prediction-platform-insider-reveals/

data.title: Data shows that listed companies and private enterprises have cumulatively increased their holdings by 883,000 BTC since January 2023.
data.description: Since January 2023, publicly traded and private companies have increased their BTC holdings from 197,000 to 1.08 million. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Crypto derivatives exchange Bitnomial receives CFTC approval to launch prediction market
data.description: Crypto derivatives exchange Bitnomial has announced that it has received approval from the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) to clear fully collateralized swap contracts, enabling it to offer prediction market services. Currently, the service will focus on two main areas: cryptocurrencies and economic events. In addition, the exchange's clearing function, Bitnomial Clearinghouse, can also provide a wider range of clearing services to its partners' prediction markets, thereby gaining collateral liquidity between the U.S. dollar and cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Public and Private Companies Increase Bitcoin Holdings in 2023
data.description: According to Odaily, public and private companies have significantly increased their Bitcoin holdings since January 2023. The number of BTC held by these entities has risen from 197,000 to 1.08 million.

data.title: Bitnomial Gains CFTC Approval for Fully Collateralized Swap Contracts
data.description: According to Odaily, cryptocurrency derivatives exchange Bitnomial has received approval from the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) to clear fully collateralized swap contracts. This approval enables Bitnomial to offer prediction market services, focusing on cryptocurrency and economic events. Additionally, Bitnomial's clearing function, Bitnomial Clearinghouse, can now provide a broader range of clearing services to partner prediction markets, facilitating collateral liquidity between U.S. dollars and cryptocurrencies.
